summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Collision & Parallel Run feature (Kolize a paralelní běh). All backend APIs and frontend UI working correctly. 15/15 backend tests pass. Frontend Kolize tab fully functional with toggle, resources checkboxes, and blocked programs selection.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - minor accessibility issue

critical_code_review_comments: collision_service.py correctly implements time block parsing for both 'HH:MM' and 'HH:MM-HH:MM' formats
Booking collision check properly returns 409 status with Czech error message when collision detected
Program model includes allow_parallel (BOOLEAN), collision_resources (JSONB), blocked_program_ids (JSONB) fields
Frontend Kolize tab correctly shows/hides resources and blocked programs sections based on toggle state
ProgramsPage.js renderCollisionTab() function properly handles all collision settings UI
context_for_next_testing_agent: Collision feature fully tested. Backend: 15 tests pass covering time block parsing, program collision fields, collision updates, booking collision detection (409), and availability endpoint. Frontend: Kolize tab in program edit dialog works correctly - toggle shows/hides resources (Lektor, Místnost) and blocked programs sections. Settings persist correctly via PUT /api/programs/{id}. All UI text in Czech as required.

backend_api.GET /api/programs: PASS - Returns allow_parallel, collision_resources, blocked_program_ids fields
backend_api.GET /api/programs/{id}: PASS - Returns collision fields for single program
backend_api.PUT /api/programs/{id}: PASS - Saves collision settings (allow_parallel, collision_resources, blocked_program_ids)
backend_api.POST /api/bookings/public/{institution_i: PASS - Returns 409 when collision detected for non-parallel program
backend_api.GET /api/availability/{institution_id}/{: PASS - Returns time blocks with booked status for collisions
backend_api.GET /api/programs/public/{institution_id: PASS - Returns collision fields in public programs

frontend_ui.Program edit dialog tabs: PASS - Shows Detail, Nastavení, Kolize, Mailing tabs
frontend_ui.Kolize tab - toggle OFF: PASS - Shows 'Nelze paralelně provozovat (překryv zakázán)' with summary
frontend_ui.Kolize tab - toggle ON: PASS - Shows 'Paralelní provoz povolen' with resources and blocked programs sections
frontend_ui.Kolize tab - resources checkboxes: PASS - Lektor and Místnost checkboxes visible and clickable
frontend_ui.Kolize tab - blocked programs: PASS - Shows other programs with checkboxes to block
frontend_ui.Save collision settings: PASS - Toast 'Program byl úspěšně aktualizován' shown, settings persist

time_block_parser.Invalid format: PASS - Returns (None, None) for invalid input
time_block_parser.Overlap detection: PASS - Correctly detects overlapping time blocks

verified_features.details: Settings persist correctly after save and page reload
Returns 409 with Czech error message when collision detected
Toggle OFF hides resources/blocked programs, Toggle ON shows them
Save button works, toast shown, settings persist

verified_features.feature: Time block parser handles both formats
